summary:
Claim: Intra-epithelial bullae are a hallmark feature of pemphigus due to autoimmune destruction of desmosomes.  
Evidence: - Autoantibodies target desmoglein proteins, disrupting cell-to-cell adhesion. - This leads directly to acantholysis within the epidermis, forming intra-epithelial blisters.  
Answer: A
